text: Keep planning and position results deterministic and auditable without owning analytics interpretation. Evidence [direct]: the accepted BUDGET-to-INSIGHTS boundary requires one reproducible plan baseline while reserving pace, forecast, trend, anomaly, and narrative for INSIGHTS. Actor/workflow trace: P1 through UC-BUDGET-003 and UC-BUDGET-004; INSIGHTS consumes the raw result.
target: Equivalent plan and unchanged LEDGER snapshot inputs produce semantically identical ordered results; all values cite plan revision and actuals snapshot provenance, while no result invents pace, forecast, trend, anomaly, or narrative.
